habitat: Europe and Asia; naturalized widely in North America.
traditionalUsesEn: Traditional respiratory demulcent leaf tea and flower oil for ear comfort traditions.
traditionalUsesDe: Traditionell reizmildernder Blättertee bei Atemwegen; Blütenöl traditionell bei Ohrbeschwerden.
preparation: Leaf tea strained well (hairs irritating); flower-infused oil external.
cautions: Strain teas carefully. Ear symptoms need medical evaluation—do not delay care.
historicalNotes: Torch-like biennial of roadsides; classical European and settler herb.
habitatDe: Europa und Asien; eingebürgert widely in Nordamerika.
preparationDe: Blatt Tee strained well (hairs irritating); Blüte-infused Öl äußerlich.
cautionsDe: Strain teas carefully. Ear symptoms need medical evaluation—do not delay care.
historicalNotesDe: Torch-like biennial von Wegränder; classical Europaan und settler Kraut.
